message:
refactor(tools): take owned Vec<u8> in ingest_bash_chunk to avoid clone

Change ingest_bash_chunk() and process_bash_chunk() signatures from
borrowing &[u8] to taking owned Vec<u8>. The function was already
cloning the slice into chunks.push_back(chunk.to_vec()), so passing
ownership directly eliminates that allocation.

Callers (run_bash_command drain loops) already receive owned Vec<u8>
from the mpsc channel rx.try_recv(), so removing the borrow just
passes ownership through without any semantic change.

Also reorders chunks_bytes update to happen before push_back so the
accounting is updated before the owned data moves into the deque.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
